title: APA Misses on Q1 Earnings, Ups Capex, Lowers Output View
text: APA Corporation (APA) bought back 7.2 million shares at $36 apiece during the first quarter. The company also spent $43 million in the form of dividend payment.

title: EOG Resources' Q1: Gushing FCF And New '60% Return' Commitment
text: EOG announced its Q1 EPS report Friday and delivered a whopping $2.4 billion in free cash flow. The company also announced a $1.80/share special dividend and a commitment to return 60% of FCF to shareholders on an annual basis.

title: EOG Resource Reports Strong Q1, Lifts Energy Sector ETFs
text: Energy sector-related exchange traded funds are strengthening Friday after EOG Resources' (NYSE: EOG) first quarter results beat expectations and declared a special dividend. On Friday, the iShares U.S. Oil & Gas Exploration & Production ETF (Cboe: IEO) advanced 1.8% and the broader Energy Select Sector SPDR (NYSEArca: XLE) gained 1.9%.

title: EOG Resources (EOG) Tops Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: EOG Resources (EOG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.40% and 34.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: EOG Resources profit more than doubles, dividend raised on soaring oil prices
text: U.S. shale producer EOG Resources Inc said on Thursday its first-quarter profit more than doubled and raised its dividend, as the Ukraine crisis pushed oil prices to multi-year highs.
